{"id":"ums-memory-d6q.5.11","title":"UMS P3-05 T11: Prompt-injection resistant personalization curation","description":"Harden personalization curation so untrusted instructions cannot become procedural truths without validation.

{"description":"Phase P3 roadmap backbone from PLAN.md covering learner profiles, misconception tracking, and memory-driven curriculum planning with backend-only delivery and strict store isolation.

## Success Criteria

new_value:
{"description":"Define and implement evidence-pointer requirements for learner profile mutations so no profile truth exists without episodic grounding.

- Violations are rejected with deterministic error semantics.
- Contract examples are documented for API/CLI/MCP consumers."}

{"id":"ums-memory-48u","title":"Add multi-store memory ingestion for JIRA and agent conversations","description":"Implement isolated memory stores and source-aware ingestion so JIRA history and coding-agent conversations can be ingested separately. new_value:
{"description":"Define and implement evidence-pointer requirements for learner profile mutations so no profile truth exists without episodic grounding.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Every learner-profile mutation payload includes at least one evidence pointer or explicit policy exception.
- Violations are rejected with deterministic error semantics.
- Contract examples are documented for API/CLI/MCP consumers."}
